allow: Bash(GHCR_TOKEN=dummy POSTGRES_PASSWORD=dummy KEYCLOAK_DB_PASSWORD=dummy KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_PASSWORD=dummy az bicep build-params --file infra/main.bicepparam)

PowerShell($exec = "migrator-dj247rb"; $start = Get-Date; while \($true\) { $st = az containerapp job execution show -g rg-kombats-demo -n migrator --job-execution-name $exec --query "properties.status" -o tsv; Write-Host "$\(Get-Date -Format HH:mm:ss\) status=$st"; if \($st -eq "Succeeded" -or $st -eq "Failed"\) { break }; if \(\(\(Get-Date\) - $start\).TotalMinutes -gt 5\) { Write-Host "TIMEOUT"; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 15 })

PowerShell($bff = "https://bff.yellowsky-28de604f.westeurope.azurecontainerapps.io"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "$bff/health" -UseBasicParsing -SkipHttpErrorCheck -TimeoutSec 15; "BFF /health: $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.StatusDescription\)" } catch { "BFF /health err: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest $bff -UseBasicParsing -SkipHttpErrorCheck -TimeoutSec 15; "BFF /: $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.StatusDescription\)" } catch { "BFF / err: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($bff = "https://bff.yellowsky-28de604f.westeurope.azurecontainerapps.io"; foreach \($p in @\("/health","/"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "$bff$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "BFF $p`: $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.StatusDescription\)" } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { "BFF $p`: $\([int]$resp.StatusCode\) $\($resp.StatusDescription\)" } else { "BFF $p err: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } catch { try { $code=$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; $desc=$_.Exception.Response.ReasonPhrase; "BFF $p`: $code $desc" } catch { "BFF $p err: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } })

PowerShell($kc = "https://keycloak.yellowsky-28de604f.westeurope.azurecontainerapps.io"; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest "$kc/realms/kombats/.well-known/openid-configuration" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $resp.StatusCode; $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object issuer, authorization_endpoint | Format-List)

PowerShell(foreach \($a in @\('battle','players','matchmaking','chat','keycloak','postgres','redis','rabbitmq'\)\) { $st = az containerapp replica list -g rg-kombats-demo -n $a --query "[0].{state:properties.runningState, container:properties.containers[0].runningState}" -o json 2>$null; "$a -> $st" })

PowerShell($apps = @\('bff', 'battle', 'players', 'matchmaking', 'chat'\); for \($i = 0; $i -lt 12; $i++\) { $allUp = $true; foreach \($app in $apps\) { $st = az containerapp show -g rg-kombats-demo -n $app --query "properties.runningStatus" -o tsv; Write-Host "$app = $st"; if \($st -ne 'Running'\) { $allUp = $false } }; if \($allUp\) { Write-Host "All apps Running"; break }; Write-Host "---"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 15 })

PowerShell(foreach \($a in @\('bff','battle','players','matchmaking','chat'\)\) { $r = az containerapp replica list -g rg-kombats-demo -n $a --query "[0].{state:properties.runningState, container:properties.containers[0].runningState}" -o json 2>$null | ConvertFrom-Json; "{0,-12} state={1,-11} container={2}" -f $a, $r.state, $r.container })
